footer.description: Curated book recommendations from your favorite curators
footer.affiliateText: We receive a commission on purchases made through our links. There are no additional costs for you. The commission helps us run this platform and continue to offer curated book recommendations.

hero.headline: THE MOST PERSONAL BOOKSHOP ONLINE.
hero.subtitle: Curated by people with passion and expertise.
hero.description: coratiert, the community bookshop where curators and experts present their favourite works. Discover books beyond the mainstream, support publishers with every purchase, and contribute to a diverse cultural and media landscape.
hero.emptyState: Curators with published bookstores will appear here automatically.

cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to ensure the functionality of our website and to improve your user experience. With your consent, we analyse the use of our website and can display personalised content. You can revoke your consent at any time.
cookies.moreInfoText: More information can be found in our
cookies.necessaryDescription: These cookies are required for basic website functions and cannot be disabled. They store, for example, your cookie preferences and shopping basket contents.
cookies.analyticsDescription: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting and analysing information anonymously.
cookies.marketingDescription: These cookies are used to make advertising more relevant to you and your interests. They are also used to limit the frequency of advertisements.

matching.title: FIND YOUR NEXT BOOK
matching.intro: Choose how much time you have – we'll find the perfect book for you.
matching.timeQuestion: HOW MUCH TIME DO YOU HAVE?
matching.timeDescription: The more questions you answer, the more accurate your match will be.
matching.quickDescription: Tell us a favourite book and we'll suggest similar ones.
matching.mediumDescription: For whom, age, profession, hobbies, mood & perspective – the key factors.
matching.completeDescription: All factors plus genre preferences and book preferences for the best results.
matching.swipeDescription: Swipe through books, authors and quotes – we'll learn your taste.
matching.moodTitle: HOW DO YOU WANT TO FEEL?
matching.moodSubtitle: Choose the mood that best matches your current reading mood.
matching.professionTitle: WHAT DO YOU DO FOR A LIVING?
matching.hobbiesSubtitle: Choose up to 3 hobbies that describe you.
matching.themesSubtitle: Choose the topics that appeal to you most.
matching.bookPreferencesTitle: WHAT KIND OF BOOKS DO YOU PREFER?

dashboardLanding.title: Dashboard | coratiert.de
dashboardLanding.metaDescription: Manage your Creator Bookstore, Author profiles and Publisher content - all in one place.
dashboardLanding.heroDescription: Create your own bookstore, manage your books as an author, or showcase your publishing program - all in one place.
dashboardLanding.creatorDescription: Your personal bookstore is already activated. Create reviews, share recommendations and build your community.
dashboardLanding.authorDescription: As a verified author, you get extended features for managing your books and interacting with your readers.
dashboardLanding.publisherDescription: As a publisher, you get professional tools for managing your program and presenting your authors.
dashboardLanding.infoCreatorText: Available immediately for all users. You can get started right away and create your own bookstore.
dashboardLanding.infoAuthorText: Request access with one click. We'll review your request and activate your author profile once we've verified your identity.
dashboardLanding.infoPublisherText: For publishers, we offer comprehensive management tools. After reviewing your request, you'll get access to the full publisher backend.

faq.heroSubtitle: Find answers to the most important questions about coratiert.de
faq.intro: Have a question that isn't answered here? Feel free to write to us at
faq.ctaDescription: We're happy to help! Contact us by email or check out our detailed help articles.

microcopy.shareNotSupported: Please copy the link manually from the address bar.
